description_long: This is a rectangular, transparent glass perfume bottle with a dark, glossy plastic spray cap. The bottle's body is clear, revealing a faintly tinted liquid inside, and features a flat front and back with sharp, clean edges. One side of the bottle displays a green label with a minimalist design, including a stylized plant motif and white text. The back of the bottle has a larger label densely packed with product information in white text. The spray mechanism is integrated into the cap, which is cylindrical and slightly taller than the neck of the bottle. The overall design is modern and sleek, with a focus on clarity and simplicity.
description: A sleek, rectangular glass perfume bottle with a dark spray cap and green label, featuring minimalist design elements and clear, modern lines.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clear glass bottle with a dark spray cap and no visible label.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a green label with white text and a plant motif on the bottle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirrors the front, showing the clear glass and cap without a label.
description_view_3: Back view displays a large green label densely covered with white product information.
attribute_brand_logo: None; no visible brand logo or emblem is present on any side of the bottle.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is cylindrical, made of glossy black plastic, and fits snugly over the spray mechanism. It appears to be removable and is slightly taller than the bottle's neck, with a smooth, seamless finish and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_label_text: View 1: 'Neo Hair' (partial text visible). View 3: 'Neo Hair ...', followed by several lines of smaller white text, but the full content is not legible due to image resolution.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Rectangular with straight vertical sides, flat top and bottom, and sharp, clean edges; the silhouette is symmetrical and box-like.
attribute_decorative_elements: Minimalist plant motif on the green label; otherwise, the design is simple and free of additional decorative features.
